name: OFFICE PROPERTIES INCOME TRUST
business: Office Properties Income Trust is a REIT that owns and leases high-quality office and mixed-use properties in select U.S. markets. As of December 31, 2025, it owned 122 properties with 17.1 million rentable square feet, leased to 212 tenants, with the U.S. government as its largest tenant (17.2% of annualized rental income). The company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in October 2025 and is pursuing a restructuring plan.
sellsTo: Private sector tenants (single-tenant and multi-tenant office users)
namedCustomers: Genesys Cloud Services Holdings I, LLC
Rocky Mountain University of Health Professions, Inc.

exposures.sentence: We are a real estate investment trust, or REIT, formed in 2009 under Maryland law.

We seek to improve the environmental footprint of our properties, including by reducing carbon emissions, energy consumption and water usage, especially when doing so may reduce operating costs and exposure to policies that call for a carbon tax or other emissions-based penalties and enhance the properties competitive position.

RMR relies on information technology and systems in providing services to us, and any material failure, inadequacy, interruption or security breach of that technology or those systems could materially harm us.
